text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh... Is this not the day of Saint Valentine?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Were you aware, Trainer? I have been wanting to play the part of that saint, just once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day, and T.M. Opera O hits
the ground running... It's something I'm quite used
to already.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Without further ado, Happy Valentine's Day,
Trainer! I present you with...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Der Freischütz chocolate magic bullets from the
Opera Chocolate Series!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Within this box are seven small pieces of
bullet-shaped chocolate, six of which carry luck.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The last carries misfortune! Eat it and all hell will
break loose—on your palate!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why? Isn't it obvious? Love burns brightest
against adversity.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Overcoming this difficult trial will surely
strengthen your love for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see how this could be enjoyable, but I
can't imagine there's much use in arguing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us begin the Der Freischütz chocolate
tasting extraordinaire!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, choose whichever chocolate you wish and
bite into it with all your spirit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no stopping now. I muster up my courage,
pop one in my mouth, and...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: W-well?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Fortune has smiled upon you! You drew a
lucky one right off the bat!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And? How does my homemade chocolate taste?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! But of course it does! That's precisely why I
went through the trouble of making them myself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What a relief. Ahaha... Haha...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I tire of this, Trainer! I am bored!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We cannot end the play without a climactic
scene!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, help yourself to a second. Go on, have
another.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, she might have me eating until I take
the misfortune chocolate, so I try to protest.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, very well. I have a proposition, then. We
each have one in turns.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Whoever eats the misfortunate chocolate loses.
Do we have an accord?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O and I go back and forth eating the
chocolates.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Munch, chew, chew...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yet another lucky chocolate for me! Heh...
This tension is enthralling. Your turn now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Have you something to say?
choice_data_list:
These are Russian roulette chocolates, aren't
they?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Russian roulette? I already told you, these are
chocolate magic bullets from Der Freischütz.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... Ehh heh heh heh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Bwaa ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Chocolate magic bullets!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us continue our undeniable game of
chocolate magic bullets!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's not going to give on the name. The
both of us eat three pieces each.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: W-well?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Daaah! Trainer? TRAAAINER!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I wake up in the infirmary with a stomachache.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Regained consciousness, have you, Trainer? I'm
glad to see you escaped the grips of death.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very glad... If anything were to become of you,
I...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, please rest. I shan't leave your side until
you are right as rain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Opera O! Please, come out, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Pleeease! I'm lost without you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My word, they are loud.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Fans eagerly awaiting my presence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I canceled all of my events after you took ill.
choice_data_list: Are you sure that was a good idea?
Are you sure that was a good idea?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But of course. There is nothing in existence more
important to me than you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How much of that is true, I'm not sure. Even so,
it's easy to see she's worried about me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That was quite a Valentine's Day. But through it,
I've come to understand her feelings.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! I just recalled that I brought a get-well
present for you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Feast on this and recover your strength.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Second in the Opera Chocolate Series, the
Deluded Bridegroom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I refuse with every ounce of my being.
